channel.title: DIS — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on DIS (The Walt Disney Company) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Jeffrey Ubben: ADDED DIS (+10%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Jeffrey Ubben (ValueAct Capital) added DIS in Q2 2025 · 11.2% of portfolio. Building Disney.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Jeffrey Ubben)
